prompt: Execute Phase D D.2: Archive completed OpenSpec for oauth2-social-login. Move from openspec/changes/ to openspec/archive/ with completion metadata.

assertions.name: moves_to_archive_directory
assertions.description: Should move spec files to openspec/archive/ directory

assertions.name: preserves_spec_files
assertions.description: Should preserve proposal.md and tasks.md in archive

assertions.name: adds_completion_metadata
assertions.description: Should add completion date and PR reference to archived spec
